brand_identity.name: Mentor Global
design_principles: Simplify. Give it contrast. Stay a rebel.
AI enabled, Human but not soft
anti_patterns: No heavy rounded corners (keep it sharp/structured)

primary.usage: Sparingly for emphasis, CTAs, active states, and subtle glows. Max 10% of UI.

scales.hero_h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[5rem] font-bold tracking-tighter leading-[1.05]
scales.eyebrow: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-[#0048FF]

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B for density/data, Mode A for marketing impact). Use strict HTML grid structures.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Thin grid lines pattern: containers have border-collapse style; items have border-r border-b. Creates technical/infrastructure feel.

visual_features.buttons: Sharp rectangular. Primary: bg-[#0048FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0030CC] transition-colors. Secondary: border border-current hover:bg-black/5 (light) or hover:bg-white/10 (dark).
visual_features.cards: Flat, zero drop shadow. Separated by 1px solid lines. Large internal padding (p-8 to p-12).
visual_features.glow_effects: In dark sections (like DEXA/AI), use: bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,rgba(0,72,255,0.15),transparent_50%)] or similar very subtle volumetric light.

hero_architecture.description: Premium black and white architectural photography. Use as abstract visual in Hero or Scale section to convey unshakeable foundation.

dexa_ai_bg.description: Dark server room with subtle blue glow. Use heavily overlaid with #11111F for the DEXA intelligence background.

global_map_bg.description: Abstract blue and black globe. Use for the Global Presence section.

team_founder.description: Black and white business leader portrait. Use for the Team Page founder feature card.

pillar_abstract.description: Abstract neon data lines. Can be used selectively as a visual texture in Infrastructure cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Add Google Font 'Plus Jakarta Sans'. Configure tailwind.config.js to use it as the default sans font. Install framer-motion, lucide-react.
NAVIGATION: Create a premium desktop header with a 'Solutions' mega-menu. The header must have a solid or highly blurred background (no pure transparent) so links stay readable.

LAYOUT - GRID LINES: To achieve the requested 'thin grid lines' and 'clean cards', do NOT use standard gaps. Use CSS grids with border collapse, or wrap cards in borders. E.g., `border-r border-b border-[#11111F]/10`.
SECTION - DEXA: Build this as a dark authority section (#11111F). Add a subtle radial blue glow behind the content using tailwind radial-gradient utilities.
SECTION - SCALE: Implement animated counters (e.g., using framer-motion's useInView and useSpring) for global metrics. This section should also be dark.

COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, and complex interactive bits, but heavily customize them. Strip out all rounded borders (`rounded-md` -> `rounded-none`) to fit the sharp infrastructure vibe.
TESTING: Every single interactive element (buttons, links, form fields, dropdowns) MUST have a kebab-case `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
IMAGES: Never use generic placeholder URLs. Use ONLY the provided `image_urls` mapped to their descriptions.

PAGES: Build out placeholders/routes for all requested pages: /, /solutions, /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure, /solutions/insurance-infrastructure, /solutions/fintech-infrastructure, /solutions/ai-infrastructure, /solutions/company-operating-infrastructure, /dexa, /subsidiaries, /about, /team, /contact.
